quote.msg: 其實risk advisory 嘅internal audit 係咪姐係幫客 monitor佢地嘅audit system+俾advice? 唔會幫客整report? 睇完big 4 web 介紹覺得好亂

通常啲客會搵big 4 IA 去review一啲特定既processes (e.g. Sales, Procurement, Financial Reporting, HR and Payroll, etc.)
每個客唔同，可能剩係搵big 4 IA睇一個process，又可以engage三年，睇十幾個processes
每個process review完，big 4 IA 會出份IA report，list out嗰個process有咩control finding / efficiency finding 同recommendation

裡面都有分PN21, co-sourcing, ISAE 3402, secondment 唔同玩法，但搵得big4 通常得2個原因： 一係好似PN21 有requirement 搵人打場齋就算，一係就係有啲new/ high risk process 搵人做discharge responsibilities.

其實都係搞場大龍鳯，唔好expect 幾個manweeks可以真係搵到好value added 既finding.

p.s我指嘅consulting 唔計risk

通常啲客會搵big 4 IA 去review一啲特定既processes (e.g. Sales, Procurement, Financial Reporting, HR and Payroll, etc.)
每個客唔同，可能剩係搵big 4 IA睇一個process，又可以engage三年，睇十幾個processes
每個process review完，big 4 IA 會出份IA report，list out嗰個process有咩control finding / efficiency finding 同recommendation

裡面都有分PN21, co-sourcing, ISAE 3402, secondment 唔同玩法，但搵得big4 通常得2個原因： 一係好似PN21 有requirement 搵人打場齋就算，一係就係有啲new/ high risk process 搵人做discharge responsibilities.

其實都係搞場大龍鳯，唔好expect 幾個manweeks可以真係搵到好value added 既finding.
